chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–4248 of 2024 (M/s. Haemtech Medica Vs. F.O.P. & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.18737/2024 (Stay). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 18.11.2024 Mr. Shahab Imam, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Wajiha Mahdi, D.A.G. Syed Hakim Masood, FID DRAP Karachi..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The purpose of this petition only to the extent that a meeting was convened by the DRAP and an order was passed rejecting the proposal of the prices has been achieved. It is petitioner’s case now that they would now approach the appellate board constituted under the Drugs Act of 1976 in terms of its Section 9. They are at liberty to exhaust such remedy, however, since the compliance has been made, this petition has become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly alongwith pending application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
